items.caption: A book cover with a predominantly dark blue background featuring abstract, light blue streaks that give a sense of movement. the title "immigration detention" is prominently displayed in white capital letters at the top. below the title, a subtitle reads "the migration of a policy and its human impact" in smaller white font. the authors' names, "edited by amy netherby and stephanie j. silverman," are listed at the bottom in white text. the publisher's logo, "routledge," is visible in the bottom right corner. the overall style of the image is modern and professional, with a focus on the subject matter of the book, which is related to immigration policy and its effects on human lives.
